bugs_found: phi regalloc clash (3+ phis share register)

previous_rounds.summary: Task 3 tier-up policy flip caused fib/ackermann/mutual_recursion to hang at Tier 2; reverted.
Diagnosed tier2 hang: BuildGraph silently drops CALL B=0 args. Landed Unpromotable gate.
Phase 1 diagnostic: profiled all 5 float benchmarks.
Phase 2: FPR-resident infra. Mandelbrot -2.62%, aggregate -1.88%, zero regressions.
Phase 4: LICM pass landed. Wall-time unchanged: mandelbrot -1.6%.
LICM-invariant FPR carry. Mandelbrot -6.2%, nbody -12.2%, spectral -15.2%, matmul -12.7%.
GPR-resident int counter + fused compare+branch. fibonacci_iterative -7.4%, matmul -2.7%, math_intensive -3.5%. Float loops ~1-2% (superscalar hides insn-level savings).
Phase 3+5: B=0 fix kept (correctness). Tier 2 net-negative for recursive functions — 27-50% regressions, reverted.
Phase 3: Guard insertion code correct at IR level, but feedback never collected — Tier 1 doesn't collect feedback, interpreter never runs with BaselineCompileThreshold=1.
Native ArrayBool/ArrayFloat fast paths in emitGetTableNative/emitSetTableNative. Sieve -18-25% (0.227s→0.186s). Eliminated exit-resume for bool/float typed arrays.
Tier 1 float/bool GETTABLE/SETTABLE fast paths + feedback infra + Tier 2 raw-int key/const-value bypasses. matmul -80.2%, spectral -54.0%, sieve -55.9%.
Re-enabled OSR with LoopDepth >= 2 gate. mandelbrot -80%, spectral_norm -64%, matmul -29%, fannkuch -16%. mandelbrot now 1.27x from LuaJIT.
Load Elimination (block-local GetField CSE) + TypeFloat guard fix. nbody -26%, broad 17-49% across GetField-heavy benchmarks.
GETFIELD feedback recording in Go exit handlers + shape guard dedup. nbody -8.3%, table_field_access -23.5%, spectral_norm -8.7%.

LICM GetField hoisting + store-to-load forwarding. Infra landed correctly but nbody target unchanged: inner loop has SetField on same objects, blocking hoisting. S2L forwarding subsumed by existing CSE.

Table validation dedup (tableVerified) + array kind feedback + kind-specialized emit. Infra landed correctly. Sieve unchanged: branch predictor already handled dispatch cascade for free. Secondary: fannkuch -10%, table_array_access -6%.

Native GetGlobal dispatch + LICM hoisting + Tier 1 self-call optimization. nbody -49% (0.555s→0.284s), fib -90% (1.365s→0.135s), fib_recursive -90%. ackermann +137% regression from self-call overhead on tight recursion.
Production typing diagnostic confirms Scenario A (feedback works). R(0) pin to X22 + NaN-boxed closure cache in X21. nbody -8.1%, broad 8-23% across 18/22 benchmarks from slot-0 register pinning.
Float param guards + GuardType CSE + LICM whitelist. nbody -10.3%, spectral -8.7%, table_field_access -17.3%, broad improvements. Bugfix: mixed int/float params excluded from float speculation.

Guard hoisting in LICM + cross-block shape/table verification propagation (single-predecessor). Infra landed correctly. A/B testing confirmed zero wall-time change — M4 superscalar hides removed guards (predicted branches, low IPC cost). Also fixed OpAppend/OpSetList LICM alias, tableVerified exit-resume clearing.

Forward KnownInt analysis + int-specialized ADD/SUB/MUL/EQ/LT/LE templates. ackermann -5.2% (0.595s→0.564s), fib -4.3% (0.140s→0.134s). mutual_recursion +4.9% regression (guard overhead exceeds body saving on small protos). Float benchmarks untouched.

Harness repair: median-of-N benchmark runner + re-baseline with median-of-5. Confirmed R24 wins (ackermann -6.2%, fib -5.0%). Phantom regressions were single-shot noise. Stretch: int-spec overflow deopt now resumes at guard PC (not pc=0) via vm.ResumeFromPC — prevents side-effect replay.

Go goroutines start at 8KB stack; JIT cannot call morestack; NativeCallDepth=48 is goroutine-stack budget, not paranoia. SP-floor approach fails (7KB residual << 2MB floor). Task 0 fixture committed at 878e64a (923 insns baseline). Tasks 1-3 aborted. See opt/premise_error.md.
